$comment: HTTP serving benchmark (Phase 8). Script: benchmarks/benchmark_server.py. Docs: docs/benchmarks.md. Note: TTFT is approximate (httpx.ASGITransport buffers full response, not true first-token). True TTFT requires uvicorn + real streaming client.

meta.note: ASGITransport buffers full response — TTFT = whole response latency (not true streaming first-token time)

summary.vram_note: HTTP serving layer adds no GPU memory vs Phase 6/7 inference engine
